name: energy_forecast
description: Weekly building energy consumption forecast using weather features

exogenous_columns.name: avg_temp_c
exogenous_columns.note: Next week's temperature is not known in advance — will be extended using the configured strategy (naive_carry by default)

exogenous_columns.name: is_holiday_week
exogenous_columns.note: Holiday calendar is known in advance for any future date

columns.name: week_date
columns.description: Monday of the measurement week (join key between the two raw files)
columns.mapping_hint: Named 'week_date' in both raw files — use this as the join key

columns.name: kwh_consumed
columns.description: Total energy consumed that week in kWh (forecast target)

columns.name: avg_temp_c
columns.description: Weekly average outdoor temperature in Celsius — unknown future, will be extended

columns.name: is_holiday_week
columns.description: 1 if the week contains a public holiday, 0 otherwise — known future (calendar)
